name: AutoMockup
tagline: Full-page screenshots auto-framed with OS/browser chrome
description: Concept stage. Chrome extension that captures a full-page screenshot and wraps it in a realistic browser frame matching the user's OS and browser. MV3 + Canvas API + Offscreen Document. Planned freemium: free (10/day, watermark) → Pro $4.99/mo or $39/yr.
